consistency.notes: The structure aligns with expected spell data. All core attributes (level, school, casting time, range, components, duration, classes) are present and consistently formatted.

quality.notes: The description clearly lists all potential effects remedied by the spell. Mechanical effects (reducing exhaustion, ending conditions, restoring ability scores/HP maximum) are explicitly stated.

components.material: diamond dust worth at least 100 gp, which the spell consumes

effects_cured: End one effect that charmed the target
End one effect that petrified the target
End one curse (including attunement to a cursed magic item)
End any reduction to one of the target's ability scores
End one effect reducing the target's hit point maximum
